title: Kenyon Cell GAL4 Lines
prompts: Which GAL4 lines label Kenyon cells

messages.content: Which GAL4 lines label Kenyon cells

Here’s the best partial answer I can give from the outputs gathered so far. This is partial because the query branched into many terminologies and driver lines, and I stopped before exhaustively resolving every GAL4 term to a Kenyon-cell labeling status.

What I can confirm from the available data
- The explicitly confirmed Kenyon-cell GAL4 driver in the collected results is OK107-GAL4 (also shown as ey-OK107 in the ScerGAL4 allele record). This line is documented in Virtual Fly Brain as ScerGAL4[ey-OK107] and is associated with the OK107 promoter driving GAL4 expression. In particular, you can see the OK107 entry (including ey-OK107) in the VFB results, and stock information showing ey[OK107] used in a KC-related genotype.
  - Evidence: VFB entries for OK107 show ScerGAL4[ey-OK107] (OK107) and related stock/genotype examples where ey[OK107] is used.
  - Source type: Virtual Fly Brain data (OK107/GAL4 driver; ey-OK107 allele; stock references)
  - Suggested reading on VFB: OK107-related GAL4 driver line entry (ScerGAL4 ey-OK107)

- There are many additional JRC-derived GAL4 lines listed in the dataset (e.g., JRC_R93A07-GAL4_MCFO_Brain_20190529_62_G6_40x, JRC_R78E05-GAL4_MCFO_Brain_20190604_61_D3_40x, etc.). These appear in the same OK107/GAL4 result set, but their Kenyon-cell labeling status is not confirmed in the outputs I have here. To state they label Kenyon cells would require fetching the term information for each line and verifying KC-specific expression.
  - Note: These lines exist in the dataset as GAL4 candidates, but KC labeling requires explicit confirmation from their term entries.

- Regarding MB247-GAL4: I did not find a direct, confirmed MB247-GAL4 entry in the results I can cite here. MB247 is a known promoter used with Kenyon cells in many constructs (e.g., MB247-based GFP reporters), but a confirmed MB247-GAL4 KC driver status would require a direct VFB term entry that I did not pull up in this partial session.

Bottom line
- Best-supported KC-GAL4 driver in the gathered data: OK107-GAL4 (ScerGAL4 ey-OK107), with evidence in VFB showing the ey-OK107 allele and stock usage.
- Other GAL4 lines in the dataset exist, but their Kenyon-cell labeling status is not yet verified from the outputs available here.

Direct follow-up questions to narrow and continue
1) Do you want only lines that label all Kenyon cells (global KC labeling), or are you also interested in lines that label specific Kenyon-cell subtypes (e.g., gamma, alpha'/beta', etc.)?
2) Should I focus on adult mushroom body Kenyon cells, or include larval stages as well?
3) Would you like me to retrieve and verify the labeling status for a smaller set of candidate lines (e.g., the top 5–10 JRC-derived GAL4 lines from the OK107 result set) to confirm whether they label Kenyon cells?
